last_intelligence.title: We need to write a full detailed step-by-step guide with the structure: Prerequisites, Step 1, Step 2, Step 3, Step 4, Step 5, Step 6, Cost Breakdown, Production Checklist, What to Do Next. Use tools like Apollo.io (B2B sales intelligence), Make.com (automation), Zapier, Replit, ElevenLabs (voice synthesis?), but we need text. Might use [Vapi](https://vapi.ai/) for voice agents? But for cold email outreach, we can use Apollo.io, Make.com, Zapier, Replit, Canva (for email templates), [Grammarly](https://grammarly.com/) (writing assistance), Midjourney (image generation for attachments). Use ChatGPT for content generation, maybe. We'll incorporate.
